description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular form and clean lines, upholstered in a light beige fabric. The seating area consists of three large, flat cushions, with two loose throw pillows in complementary neutral tones for added comfort and style. The backrest and a single armrest are positioned along one side, providing support while maintaining an open, inviting appearance. The chaise is elevated on four short, tapered black legs, giving it a slightly raised profile and a contemporary touch. The upholstery appears to be a tightly woven fabric with a subtle, uniform texture, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame beneath the cushioning. This piece is well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern parks, or communal outdoor lounges.
description: A modern beige chaise with clean lines, three seat cushions, two throw pillows, and a single armrest, elevated on four black tapered legs. The upholstery is a subtly textured, tightly woven fabric.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the chaise, the single armrest and backrest on the right, and the extended seat area on the left.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the width of the chaise, the two throw pillows against the backrest, and the armrest on the left side.
description_view_2: Top-down angled view displaying the three seat cushions, two throw pillows, and the overall rectangular shape with the armrest and backrest along one side.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing the depth of the chaise, the arrangement of the cushions, and the open side without an armrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, medium-height, and runs along one side of the chaise, meeting the armrest at a right angle. It is unadorned, with a smooth, continuous surface and no visible tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: A single armrest is present on the right side (when facing the backrest), matching the height and style of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and slightly tapered, made of what appears to be black-finished wood or metal, with a simple, modern design and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid, light beige color with a subtle, uniform woven texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three large, rectangular seat cushions arranged side by side, with two loose throw pillows of different sizes placed against the backrest and armrest for added comfort and visual interest.
